creator: pauamma@gundo.com
text:
In Chromium (Version 88.0.4324.96 (Official Build) (64-bit)) with zoom at 150%, when I open chapter 3 in the table of contents pane, section 3.5 shows as "Checking the port portlint with" despite the HTML source showing the words in the correct order.

Someone in #bsddocs reports seeing almost the same ("Portportlint" instead) in Firefox with no zoom applied.
